html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Beata’s scalp has been under pressure since pregnancy and long-running stress—two powerful but fixable forces. She’s now in the stabilization phase, when the worst shedding eases but regrowth still hides beneath the surface. This plan focuses on restoring deep sleep rhythm, calming the chronic stress loop, and rebuilding nutrient reserves with protein and omega‑3 support. With each small routine anchored, her body can shift from “just coping” to truly repairing and preparing for visible regrowth. 🌱

Steady actions this month lay the roots for lasting renewal.
